subcodes.first_line: The Kingdom of Utterance, amidst the intensity of sorrows, is occupied with the remembrance of the friends, that perchance the calumnies of the calumniators and the clamor [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ملکوت بیان در بحبوحه احزان بذکر دوستان مشغول که شاید مفتریات مفترین و ضوضاء
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for teaching, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
